subject: Ares, God of War from Disney's Hercules — stocky red-armored deity wielding a sword and shield in aggressive battle pose
description: A stocky, muscular figure clad entirely in red and dark brown armor charges forward with a raised sword in one hand and a large round shield in the other. The figure has a distinctly cartoon-proportioned head with an angry scowling expression and a plumed red helmet crest. The background is a dark cave or underground stone environment with stalactites, lit by a warm reddish-orange glow emanating from below. The aggressive wide-legged stance and glowing red aura reinforce the 'god of war' archetype visually.
foreground: Stocky red-armored figure with sword raised and round shield, charging pose
background: Dark cave with stalactites, warm red-orange glow from below
